name: Error handler

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ alert_type: 'workflow_error', severity: $json.severity, failed_services: 'n8n', api_status: $json.error_message, workflow_name: $json.workflow_name, failed_node: $json.failed_node, execution_id: $json.execution_id, execution_url: $json.execution_url, detected_at: $json.detected_at }) }}

description: Assign as n8n global error workflow (Settings). Extracts workflow/node/execution context and severity (OOM=critical, timeouts/conn=warning), posts a richer workflow_error alert to /api/system/alerts, and notifies Slack when SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is set.
